content.json:
## NeighborhoodIQ ingest status

Scope + per-worker **data completion %** from slim `INGEST_STATUS_SNAPSHOT` logs (metrics only — no full county lists).

Emitted by orchestrator / workers mid-run, or: `az containerapp job start --name niq-worker-status --resource-group neighborhoodiq-rg`

Primary durable source: Postgres table `ingest_status_snapshot` (includes full detail).

content.query:
ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Log_s has "INGEST_STATUS_SNAPSHOT"
| extend jsonStart = indexof(Log_s, "{")
| where jsonStart >= 0
| extend payload = parse_json(substring(Log_s, jsonStart))
| where isnotnull(payload) and tostring(payload.scope) == "{Scope}"
| top 1 by TimeGenerated desc
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    scope = tostring(payload.scope),
    county_count = toint(payload.county_count),
    captured_at = tostring(payload.captured_at)
content.title: Current scope (latest snapshot)

content.query:
ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Log_s has "INGEST_STATUS_SNAPSHOT"
| extend jsonStart = indexof(Log_s, "{")
| where jsonStart >= 0
| extend payload = parse_json(substring(Log_s, jsonStart))
| where isnotnull(payload) and tostring(payload.scope) == "{Scope}"
| top 1 by TimeGenerated desc
| mv-expand job = payload.jobs
| project
    job_name = tostring(job.job_name),
    pct_complete = todouble(job.pct_complete),
    done = toint(job.done_count),
    total = toint(job.total_count)
| order by job_name asc
content.title: Per-job data completion %

content.query:
ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Log_s has "INGEST_STATUS_SNAPSHOT"
| extend jsonStart = indexof(Log_s, "{")
| where jsonStart >= 0
| extend payload = parse_json(substring(Log_s, jsonStart))
| where isnotnull(payload) and tostring(payload.scope) == "{Scope}"
| top 1 by TimeGenerated desc
| mv-expand job = payload.jobs
| project job_name = tostring(job.job_name), pct_complete = todouble(job.pct_complete)
| render barchart
content.title: Completion bar chart
